overall.description: A cinematic gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a player character exploring a rural cliffside at golden hour. The character walks from a wooden farmhouse along a grassy cliff edge overlooking misty water below, then loops back through open prairie to return to the house.

events.description: begins at wooden farmhouse porch overlooking cliffside
starts walking along the cliff edge away from the house

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the cliffside path, observing the farmhouse and surrounding trees

entered.detail: two-story wooden house with porch and brick chimney
mature deciduous tree with full green canopy
grassy cliff edge dropping off to misty water below

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wooden farmhouse perched on a grassy cliff edge during golden hour. The camera walks slowly along the cliff path, keeping the house on the left while the cliff edge and distant misty horizon dominate the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge overlooking misty canyon water

events.description: house exits view, scene becomes pure cliff edge and open sky
camera tilts down to look over the cliff edge at the water below

agents.ego_description: carefully walking along the cliff edge and looking down at the misty water far below

notable_agents.action: crows flying over the cliff edge and mist

entered.detail: mist-covered water visible at the bottom of the cliff canyon
hazy mountain silhouettes on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Having left the farmhouse behind, the camera explores the dramatic cliff edge with the sun creating a hazy backlight. The view opens to reveal misty water far below the cliff face, with crows flying overhead and distant mountains barely visible through the atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from cliff to open prairie grassland

events.description: turns away from the cliff edge to head back inland
moves from cliff edge to open grassland with distant buildings visible

agents.ego_description: turning away from the cliff and walking through tall grass back toward the farmstead

entered.detail: tall prairie grass with wildflowers covering the rolling terrain
isolated trees dotting the open grassland

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the precipice and moves through an open grassland. The cliff edge recedes to the left as the terrain opens into rolling prairie, with the farmhouse becoming visible again in the distance and scattered trees breaking up the horizon.

events.description: farmhouse comes back into view as camera approaches from the field
game UI prompt appears for picking and examining a flower

agents.ego_description: walking through the tall grass approaching the farmhouse, with game interaction prompt appearing

entered.detail: returning to the two-story wooden house from the grassy approach
additional farm building visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the return approach to the farmhouse through the prairie grass. The cliff and water are now behind as the camera moves toward the wooden house, with a game UI prompt appearing in the corner indicating the player can interact with a flower on the ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cliffside farmhouse out toward a misty precipice and back across an open prairie. It begins by walking slowly along a grassy path with a wooden house to the left and a distant, hazy horizon to the right. As the farmhouse recedes, the view opens to reveal a dramatic cliff edge overlooking misty water far below, where crows fly through the golden backlight of the sun and distant mountains emerge from the haze. The camera then turns away from the precipice to traverse rolling grasslands, causing the cliff to shift to the left as the terrain expands into an open prairie dotted with scattered trees. Finally, the movement loops back toward the farmhouse through the tall grass, leaving the water behind and approaching the house as a UI prompt appears for a flower on the ground.
